title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
